overall.description: Gameplay footage from Spider-Man 2 featuring two distinct environments: Miles Morales in a glowing suit walking through a rainy night city street with pedestrians and traffic, followed by Peter Parker exploring a futuristic sculpture park at golden hour sunset.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with street seating and vehicle traffic

character places hand on pedestrian's shoulder while passing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through crowded sidewalk, occasionally glancing at surroundings, then performing a flip onto light strips

yellow taxi cab driving along the street

metal staircase attached to retaining wall leading to upper level
row of deciduous trees lining the street edge
lighted panels embedded in sidewalk surface emitting warm glow
classic yellow taxi cab visible on the street

segments.scene_description: Miles Morales in a glowing suit walks along a wet downtown sidewalk at night, passing pedestrians and street seating. The character performs an acrobatic flip onto illuminated ground strips and interacts briefly with a pedestrian, while yellow taxis drive past on the adjacent street.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic sculpture park with abstract monuments at sunset

events.description: fade from black reveals golden hour sunset scene with futuristic architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated wooden walkway toward large abstract sculptures silhouetted against sunset

entered.detail: large white abstract arching sculpture dominating the skyline
sculpture with rotating rings resembling an atomic model
modern building with illuminated GIFT SHOP signage
wooden plank walkway with visible grain and gaps
metal safety railing along the left edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Peter Parker walks through an empty futuristic sculpture park at golden hour, approaching massive abstract white monuments silhouetted against the bright orange sunset. The wooden walkway leads past a gift shop building toward intricate orbital sculptures with the city skyline visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked downtown district at night, capturing the vibrant energy of a city street. It begins with Miles Morales in a glowing suit walking along a wet sidewalk, passing by pedestrians and outdoor street seating. As he moves, the camera tracks his acrobatic flip onto illuminated ground strips, momentarily pausing for a brief interaction with a passerby. The scene then expands to include the adjacent roadway, where yellow taxis stream past under the glow of city lights before the camera continues its forward progression through the urban environment.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic sculpture park as it transitions from a quiet walkway toward a vista of massive abstract monuments. It begins with Peter Parker walking along a wooden path during the golden hour, moving past a gift shop building. As he advances, the scene opens up to reveal intricate orbital sculptures silhouetted against a bright orange sunset. The camera then pushes forward toward the towering white monuments, finally expanding the view to include the distant city skyline under the glowing evening sky.
